privacy.title: Lekunutu
privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Ha senotlolo se secha sa kamore se amoheloa - fetisetsa ka bo eona lisebelisoa tsohle tsa hau (E2E encrypted)
privacy.historySyncHint: Khopi e patiloeng ea melaetsa e fumaneha lisebelisoa tsohle. Seva e bona lerata feela
privacy.crossSignHint: Netefatsa lisebelisoa tse ncha ka boiketsetso ka ho saena ha HMAC (ts'ireletso khahlanong le ho kenya sebaka)
privacy.backupHint: Ngola linotlolo tsohle ka poleloana 'me u li boloke ho seva. Phetoho ea sesebelisoa - khutlisetsa ka poleloana e le 'ngoe.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Fetisetsa linotlolo sesebelisoa se secha ka khoutu ea linomoro tse 6. Linotlolo li patiloe ka ECIES - seva ha e khone ho li bala.
privacy.ssssHint: Arola senotlolo sa master likarolong tsa N ho sebelisa morero oa Shamir. Likarolo leha e le life tsa M li tla tsosolosa senotlolo. Karolo e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e patiloe bakeng sa lebitso le itseng le tšepahalang (ECIES). Seva e bona feela li-blobs tse patiloeng.
privacy.federatedHint: Abela li-shards tse kentsoeng ka mokhoa o patiloeng ho pholletsa le li-federation node (Sekema sa Shamir). Leha seva e lahlehile - ho hlaphoheloa ka lithaka.
privacy.ktHint: Lenane la tlatsetso feela la liphetoho tsohle tsa linotlolo tsa sechaba ka ketane ea hash (Merkle). Seva se saena se kentsoeng - tlolo e bonoa nakong ea tlhahlobo.

botConstructor.scheduledMessage: Molaetsa o lokelang ho romelloa ka linako...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Rea u amohela! Ke bot ea hau. Sebelisa /thusa ho bona litaelo.
botConstructor.defaultHelp:
Litaelo tse teng:
/thuso — Bontša molaetsa ona
botConstructor.randomPick: Bot e khetha e le 'ngoe ka tšohanyetso
botConstructor.apiResponseTemplate: Setšoantšo sa karabo se nang le {data}...
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: E qala ha mosebelisi a romella molaetsa
botConstructor.adminMessage: Molaetsa o lokelang ho romelloa ho admin...
botConstructor.docsCommand: E araba ha mosebelisi a romella taelo e itseng (mohlala, /help, /start). U ka eketsa mehato ea moqoqo ho theha lipuisano tsa mehato e mengata.
botConstructor.docsMessage: E araba ha molaetsa wa mosebedisi o bapa le paterone. E sebelisa regex - mohlala. "hello|hi" e tsamaisana le mantsoe ana ka bobeli. Ha e na taba.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Basebelisi ba molaetsa oa pele ba bona ha ba qala bot ka /start. Bot e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e lokela ho ba le eona.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: E romela molaetsa ka ho iketsa ka kemiso. E ntle bakeng sa likhopotso tsa letsatsi le letsatsi, tlhamane ea beke le beke, kapa liphatlalatso tsa nako le nako.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Makala a bot logic. Lekola tlhahiso e fapaneng kapa ea mosebelisi 'me u arabe ka tsela e fapaneng ho latela sephetho.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot e khetha karabo e le 'ngoe lethathamong. E nepahetse bakeng sa metlae, malebela, litumeliso, kapa likarabo tse fapaneng.
botConstructor.docsApi: E etsa kopo ea HTTP ho API ea kantle mme e sebelisa karabo ho molaetsa oa bot. Sebelisa {data.field} ho sheba likarolo tsa likarabo.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: E romela tsebiso ho batsamaisi ba phaposi ha e lekoa. E thusa bakeng sa litlhokomeliso, litsebiso tse ncha tsa basebelisi, kapa ho laola.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Kenya mehato ho thibela ea Taelo ho theha lipuisano tse sebetsanang. Mohato o mong le o mong o botsa potso, o emela karabo ea mosebelisi, ebe o e boloka ho mofuta o fapaneng. Sebelisa mefuta-futa karabong ea ho qetela ka {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Sebelisa li-curly braces {variable} ho sengoloa sa karabo ho kenya lintlha tse feto-fetohang. Liphetoho tsa naha li ntse li tsoela pele ho pholletsa le melaetsa.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Liphetoho tse hahelletsoeng li fumaneha karabong e ngoe le e ngoe:
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Ke 'nete haeba mosebelisi e le admin/mong'a
botConstructor.docsVarRoomId: ID ea kamore ea hona joale
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: U ka sebelisa sebopeho se kang HTML likarabong:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Qala ka Sebaka sa Kamohelo - ke ntho ea pele eo basebelisi ba e bonang
botConstructor.docsTip2: Kenya taelo ea /help e thathamisang litaelo tsohle tse fumanehang
botConstructor.docsTip3: Sebelisa mehato ea moqoqo ho ngolisa, ho etsa lipatlisiso, kapa ho bokella lintlha
botConstructor.docsTip4: Kopanya li-block tsa Condition tse nang le mefuta e fapaneng bakeng sa branching e bohlale

gravitixDocs.title: Reference Puo ea Gravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Puo ea ho ngola e sebetsang hantle bakeng sa ho aha bots. 96 likarolo. Rust backend.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix ke puo e khethehileng ea domain (DSL) e entsoeng ho tloha fatše ho ngola li-Vortex bots. Moo lipuo tse ling li hlokang lilaeborari, li-callbacks, le li-boilerplate, Gravitix e u fa batho ba sebetsanang le liketsahalo tsa maemo a holimo, meqoqo e phallang, le boemo bo hahelletsoeng - tsohle ka mokhoa o hloekileng, o balehang o bululetsoeng ke Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: E ka baloa - khoutu e baleha joalo ka sepheo, eseng mochini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Sireletsehile - mefuta e tsitsitseng e tšoara liphoso pele ho nako ea ho sebetsa
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive - phallo, balebeli, le ho bapisa mohlala li hahiloe kahare
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal - ha ho litlelase, ha ho lefa, ha ho meralo ea ho ithuta
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ke ea mang kapa mang ea batlang ho haha ​​​​bot ea Vortex kapele - hore na ha o e-so ngole khoutu pele, kapa u moqapi ea nang le phihlelo ea khathetseng ke Python boilerplate. Buka ena e ruta Gravitix ho tloha ho melao-motheo ea pele: ha ho na phihlelo ea pele e hlokahalang.
gravitixDocs.howToRead: Mokhoa oa ho bala bukana ena
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Karolo ka 'ngoe e itšetlehile ka tse fetileng. Haeba u sa tsoa qala ho etsa mananeo, bala ho tloha holimo ho ea tlase. Haeba u se u ntse u tseba puo e 'ngoe, sebelisa lethathamo la litaba ho tlolela ka ho toba seo u se ratang.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Tsela e potlakileng ho tloha ho zero ho ea ho bot e sebetsang.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start {... } - e hlalosa sebatli se sebetsang ha mosebelisi a romela /start. emit "..." - e romela molaetsa ho mosebelisi. {ctx.first_name} — e kopanya lebitso la mosebelisi khoeleng.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Ho Gravitix IDE, tobetsa konopo ea Run bareng e kaholimo. Kenya Vortex Bot Token ea hau ha u khothalletsoa. Bot e qala hang-hang - ha ho mohato oa ho haha ​​o hlokahalang.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Lenaneo le leng le le leng la Gravitix le hahiloe ho tloha ho li-blocks tse tharo tsa motheo tsa moaho: li-handers, emit statements, le logic.
gravitixDocs.multipleEmits: Melaetsa e mengata = melaetsa e mengata
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Lisebelisoa tse ngata bakeng sa "trigger" e le 'ngoe
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Boleng bo bong le bo bong ho Gravitix bo na le mofuta. Sistimi ea mofuta o tsitsitse: mefuta e hlahlojoa ka nako ea pokello, pele bot ea hau e sebetsa.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Basebelisi ba kopanya litekanyetso ho hlahisa litekanyetso tse ncha.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Lithapo ho Gravitix ke mongolo o kentsoeng oa UTF-8. Ba ts'ehetsa ho kenyeletsoa ho hoholo le sehlopha sa ts'ebetso e hahelletsoeng.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Paterone-bapisa boleng khahlano le lipaterone tse ngata. Nahana ka eona e le polelo e matla ea switjha.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Mesebetsi ke li-blocks tsa khoutu tse ka sebelisoang hape. Li u thusa ho qoba ho pheta-pheta le ho etsa hore khoutu e utloisisehe habonolo.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Handlers ke pelo ea Gravitix bot. Motshwari e mong le e mong o mamela mofuta o itseng wa ketsahalo mme o matha ha ketsahalo eo e etsahala.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Balebeli ba u lumella ho eketsa boemo ho motho ea sebetsang. Motho ea sebetsang o sebetsa feela haeba molebeli a lekola 'nete.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Ntho ea ctx e fumaneha ka bo eona kahare ho mohlokomeli e mong le e mong. E na le tlhahisoleseling mabapi le molaetsa oa hajoale le mosebelisi ea o rometseng.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: Naha e lumella bot ea hau ho hopola lintho lipakeng tsa melaetsa. Ntle le mmuso, molaetsa o mong le o mong o ikemetse mme bot ha e na mohopolo.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Phallo e etsa hore u ngole lipuisano tsa mehato e mengata ka mokhoa o hlakileng, o ka baloang. Phallo e ka ema 'me ea emela molaetsa o latelang oa mosebelisi.
gravitixDocs.waitKeyword: Lebitso la sehlooho la ho ema
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Ho romella melaetsa ke tlhahiso ea mantlha ea bot.
gravitixDocs.emitTo: emit_to - romella ho mosebelisi ea itseng
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Matha khoutu ka bo eona ka kemiso - ha ho mesebetsi ea cron, ha ho na lits'ebeletso tsa kantle tse hlokahalang.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: mong le e mong - pheta ka nako
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: ka - matha ka nako e itseng ea letsatsi
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Opereishene ea pipe |> e fetisa boleng e le khang ea pele mosebetsing o latelang. E etsa hore mesebetsi ea ketane e balehe, ho tloha ho le letšehali ho ea ho le letona.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix e fana ka ho sebetsana le liphoso tse hlophisitsoeng ka li-block / try / catch / qetellong.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Litaelo li u lumella ho bokella data e amanang le eona tlasa mofuta o itseng. Enum e hlalosa sehlopha se koetsoeng sa mefuta e fapaneng.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix e tsamaisa laeborari ea lipalo e felletseng e nang le ~ mesebetsi e 180.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix e na le mofuta oa tlhaho o rarahaneng - para ea 64-bit floats e emelang likarolo tsa 'nete le tse inahaneloang.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix e kenyelletsa lipalo tsa lipalo: li-derivatives le li-integral tse bakiloeng ka mesebetsi e sa reroang.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Linear algebra ke lipalo tsa li-vectors le matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Khopolo ea linomoro e ithuta ka litšobotsi tsa linomoro. Motheo oa mehleng ea kajeno ea li-cryptography.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Lipalopalo li fana ka lisebelisoa tsa ho hlalosa, ho sekaseka, le ho fihlela liqeto ho tsoa ho data.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Mesebetsi e khethehileng ke tharollo ea li-equation tsa bohlokoa tse fapaneng.
gravitixDocs.gammaRelated: Gamma le mesebetsi e amanang le eona
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Fourier phetoho e senya lets'oao ho maqhubu a lona.
gravitixDocs.listMethods: Mekhoa ea ho etsa lethathamo (note ea matheba)
gravitixDocs.bestPractices: Mekhoa e Molemo ka ho Fetisisa
gravitixDocs.bp1: Kamehla sebetsana le tse sa tsejoeng
gravitixDocs.bp3: Sebelisa balebeli sebakeng sa haeba-ketane bakeng sa tumello
gravitixDocs.bp5: Sebelisa ho khutlela pele ho nako ho fokotsa sehlaha
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Mokhoa o motle oa ho ithuta Gravitix ke ho haha. Qala ka echo bot e bonolo, ebe u eketsa boemo, ebe u eketsa phallo. Khopolo e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e ncha eo u ithutang eona e bula menyetla e mengata.

complex_type.cc8: Principal square root of −1 ke i
complex_type.ct1: 🌀 Hobaneng ha lipalo tse rarahaneng ka puo ea bot?
complex_type.li5: Matla: z**n e sebelisa foromo ea De Moivre bakeng sa palo e felletseng n
complex_type.p1: Nomoro e rarahaneng e na le sebopeho sa a + bi, moo a e leng karolo ea sebele le b ke karolo e inahaneloang. i ke yuniti e inahaneloang e hlalosoang ke i² = −1. Linomoro tse rarahaneng li atolosa moeli oa 'nete ho sefofane, ho lumella litharollo tsa lipalo tse kang x² + 1 = 0 tse se nang karabo ea sebele.
complex_type.p2: Ho Gravitix u ngola mantsoe a inahaneloang ka sehlohloloana sa i:
complex_type.p3: Mesebetsi eohle e mene ea motheo e sebetsa ka litekanyetso tse rarahaneng ka ho toba. Gravitix e latela melao e tloaelehileng ea lipalo e rarahaneng:
complex_type.p4: Ts'ebetso ea mats'oao (tlhahlobo ea molumo, FFT), moloko oa fractal (sete ea Mandelbrot), lipapiso tsa fisiks, lipalo tsa ho sitisa motlakase, le khomphutha ea quantum kaofela li hloka lipalo tse rarahaneng. Gravitix e o lumella ho etsa lipalo tsena hantle ka har'a Vortex bot ntle le lilaeborari tsa kantle.
complex_type.td14: Ho tsoa ho sebopeho sa polar: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td2: Construct ho tsoa ho tse peli float
complex_type.td24: Lits'ebetso tsa Trig li atoloselitsoe ho sefofane se rarahaneng

error.cc1: e hloleha haeba mosebelisi a rometse "hello"
error.h3: Ho lahlela liphoso ka ho hlaka
error.p1: Qetella khoutu efe kapa efe e ka 'nang ea hloleha ka boloko ba try. Haeba phoso e le thrown — ebang ke ka Gravitix nako ea ho sebetsa kapa ka mokhoa o hlakileng ka khoutu ea hau - ts'ebetso e tlolela catch block. Theko e ts'oeroeng e hokahane le mofuta oo u o reileng ka mor'a catch.
error.p2: finally e sebetsa ntle le maemo - hore na try e atlehile kapa catch e sebetsane le phoso. E sebelise ho lokolla lisebelisoa, ho ngolisa, kapa ho romela molaetsa oa ho qetela.
error.p3: Sebelisa ho sebetsana le liphoso bakeng sa ts'ebetso e itšetlehileng ka ho kenya letsoho ka ntle: ho hlalosa mongolo oa mosebedisi, ho letsetsa li-API, mefuta-futa ea tikoloho ea ho bala, kapa ho etsa lipalo tse rarahaneng moo liphoso tsa domain (sqrt of negative, log of zero) li ka khonehang. Bakeng sa liphoso tsa ka hare tsa mabaka, khetha guard lipoleloana le returns tsa pele.

math_complex.p2: E 'ngoe ea boitsebiso ba bohlokoa ka ho fetisisa thutong ea lipalo: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Sena se bolela hore selikalikoe sa yuniti sefofaneng se rarahaneng se na le parametrized ka angle x.
math_complex.p3: Exponential e rarahaneng, sine, cosine, le logarithm li atoloselitsoe ho sefofane se rarahaneng se felletseng. Letoto la bona la Taylor le kopana every kae (kapa ho disk bakeng sa log).

math_linalg.td11: Atisa every element ka scalar s
math_linalg.td12: Fetola mela le litšiea: Aᵀ[i][j] = A[j][i]
math_linalg.td13: Determinant (LU decomposition). E seng lefela ↔ e sa fetoheng.
math_linalg.td14: Matrix e fapaneng A⁻¹ hoo A·A⁻¹ = Ke (Gauss-Jordan)
math_linalg.td19: Rarolla tsamaiso ea mela Ax = b ka ho felisa Gaussian
math_linalg.td2: Sehlahisoa sa sefapano sa li-vector tse peli tsa 3D. Sephetho ⊥ tse peli tse kenang. |a×b| = |a||b|sebe θ
math_linalg.td4: Vector ea yuniti: v / |v|. Bolelele bo fetoha 1.
math_linalg.td7: Atisa ntho e ngoe le e ngoe ka scalar s
math_linalg.td8: Element-keketso e bohlale ea matrices a boholo bo lekanang

math_numth.td13: Mekhoa ea ho khetha k ho tloha ho n
math_numth.td19: Linomoro tse sisinyehang tsa mofuta oa bobeli: li-partitions tsa n ho k li-subsets tse se nang letho
math_numth.td2: Mangata a sa tloaelehang haholo: a·b / gcd(a,b)
math_numth.td21: Linomoro tsa Catalan: li-bracket sequences, lifate tsa binary
math_numth.td25: Linomoro tsa Bernoulli (li hlaha lethathamong la Taylor la trig/log)
math_numth.td3: Likarohano tsohle tse ntle tsa n, li hlophisoa. divisor(12)=[1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: Euler's totient φ(n): palo ea linomoro ho [1,n] coprime ho ea ho n
math_numth.td5: Modular inverse: x joalo ka hore a·x ≡ 1 (mod m). E sebelisoa ho RSA.
math_numth.td6: Phatlalatso e potlakileng ea modular: base^exp mod. O(log exp).
math_numth.td7: Teko ea mantlha ea Miller-Rabin (e khethollang n < 3.2×10¹⁸)
math_numth.td8: Lintlha tsohle tse qalang ho fihlela n ka Sieve of Eratosthenes
math_numth.td9: Prime factorization e le lethathamo. lintlha-kholo(12)=[2,2,3]

math_special.cc11: Nako e nyenyane: T ≈ 2π√(L/g) ≈ 2.006s bakeng sa L=1m
math_special.cc12: Perimithara ea ellipse e nang le lilepe tsa semi-a, b:
math_special.cc2: P(−σ < X < σ) bakeng sa kabo e tloaelehileng
math_special.cc3: Apéry's constant: ζ(3) ha e na kelello empa ha ho mokhoa o koetsoeng o tsejoang
math_special.cc4: J₀(x): oscillates le decays - e hlalosa maqhubu a radial
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): e fapoha ho x=0, oscillates bakeng sa x e kholo
math_special.cc6: Ai e bola haholo bakeng sa x→+∞, oscillates bakeng sa x→-∞
math_special.cc9: Nako ea pendulum e nang le amplitude θ₀:
math_special.p1: Mosebetsi oa Gamma Γ(n) ke kakaretso e tsoelang pele ea factorial: Γ(n) = (n−1)! bakeng sa lipalo tse ntle. E fetela ho lipalo tsa sebele le tse rarahaneng.
math_special.p2: Mosebetsi oa phoso erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t²)dt ke karolo ea karolo ea Gaussia. E amana ka kotloloho le CDF e tloaelehileng 'me e hlaha ho li-equation tsa mocheso le khopolo ea monyetla.
math_special.p3: ζ(li) = Σ 1/nˢ bakeng sa n=1,2,3,… (ha Re(li)>1). E hokahana le kabo ea mantlha ka sehlahisoa sa Euler. Khopolo-taba ea Riemann (e sa rarolloa!) e bua ka li-zero tsa ζ sefofaneng se rarahaneng.
math_special.p4: Mesebetsi ea Bessel Jₙ(x) le Yₙ(x) ke litharollo tsa phapano ea equation ea Bessel: x²y'' + xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Li hlaha ka ho phatlalatsoa ha maqhubu, ho tsamaisa mocheso ka har'a lisilindara, le mechine ea quantum.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) le Bi(x) ke tharollo ea y'' = xy. Li hlaha ka quantum tunneling (WKB approximation) le optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Malapa ana a polynomial a hlaha e le ts'ebetso ea li-operators tsa bohlokoa 'me a sebelisoa ka mekhoa ea spectral, quadrature, le quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: K(k) le E(k) ke likarolo tse felletseng tsa elliptic tsa mofuta oa pele le oa bobeli. Ba bala nako ea pendulum e se nang moeli le pherimithara ea ellipse.
math_special.td1: Γ(x) = ∫₀^∞ tˣ⁻¹e⁻ᵗdt. Khakanyo ea Lanczos. Γ(n+1)=n!
math_special.td2: ln|Γ(x)|. Avoids overflow bakeng sa x e kholo.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): orthogonal ho [−1,1]. Karolo e ka hare ea maqhubu a hydrogen wavefunctions.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): orthogonal w.r.t. e^(−x²). Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): orthogonal ho [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x). Ts'ebetso ea maqhubu a mahlaseli a hydrogen.

math_stats.cc2: Ke karolo efe ea batho ba fumanang lintlha ka tlase ho 600 ho SAT (μ=500, σ=100)?

math_stats.cc4: Karolelano ea bareki / motsotso, monyetla oa 5 hantle ka motsotso?
math_stats.cc5: Hlahisa data e tloaelehileng e sa reroang
math_stats.li1: r = 1: kamano e ntle e phethahetseng (ha X e ntse e hola, Y e hola ka ho lekana)
math_stats.li2: r = −1: kamano e mpe e phethahetseng
math_stats.li3: r ≈ 0: ha ho kamano ea linear
math_stats.p1: Ha ho fanoe ka lethathamo la linomoro, mesebetsi ena e akaretsa tloaelo ea mantlha ea data le ho hasana:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov(X,Y) = E[(X−μₓ)(Y−μᵧ)] e lekanya hore na mefuta e mmedi e tsamaya mmoho. Corelation r = cov(X,Y)/(σₓ·σᵧ) e etsa hore sena se tloaelehe ho [-1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) e lumellana le mola o motle ka ho fetisisa oa y = a + bx ho pholletsa le lintlha tsa data ho sebelisa lisekoere tse nyane tse tloaelehileng. E khutlisa [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td11: CDF: P(X ≤ x) bakeng sa kabo e tloaelehileng. E sebelisa khakanyo ea sebaka.
math_stats.td12: P(X=k) = e^(−λ)·λᵏ/k! bakeng sa kabo ea Poisson
math_stats.td14: Unifomo e sa fetoheng float ho [0, 1)
math_stats.td15: Mohlala ho tsoa ho N(μ,σ) o sebelisa Box-Muller phetoho
math_stats.td3: Bohare ba boleng ha bo hlophisoa. Bakeng sa esita le n, karolelano ea litekanyetso tse peli tse bohareng.
math_stats.td5: Karolelano ea ho kheloha ha lisekoere ho tsoa ho moelelo: Σ(xᵢ−μ)²/n
math_stats.td6: Phapang e tloaelehileng: √ho fapana. Liyuniti tse tšoanang le data.
math_stats.td8: Itloaetse ho ea ho lefela moelelo oa phapang ea yuniti: (xᵢ−μ)/σ

math_transforms.p1: Ho latela tatelano ea lisampole tsa N x[0], x[1], …, x[N-1], Discrete Fourier Transform e hlahisa likaroloana tsa N tse rarahaneng X[k]:
math_transforms.p2: MP3 le AAC compression ea molumo, JPEG compression ea setšoantšo, phetisetso ea waelese ea 5G, ts'ebetso ea mats'oao a radar, le MRI poeletso ea litšoantšostruction kaofela li itšetlehile ka FFT algorithm. Ho e utloisisa ho u fa temohisiso mabapi le karolo e kholo ea theknoloji ea sejoale-joale.
math_transforms.td1: Phetoho e potlakileng ea Fourier (Cooley-Tukey). xs: lenane la floats kapa le rarahaneng. E khutlisetsa lenane la lintho tse rarahaneng. Molemo ka ho fetisisa bakeng sa N = matla a 2.
math_transforms.td2: E fapaneng FFT. Reconstructs lets'oao la sebaka sa nako ho tsoa ho sebono.
math_transforms.td3: Naive O(n²) DFT. Sephetho se ts'oanang le fft, se sebetsa bakeng sa N.
math_transforms.td4: Phetoho: (a★b)[n] = Σₖ a[k]·b[n−k]. E sebelisoa ho lihloela tsa FIR.
math_transforms.td5: Lekola Laplace fetola polynomial ka rarahaneng s

types.p1: Nomoro e saennoeng ea 64-bit. E ts'ehetsa boleng ho tloha ho −9.2 × 10¹⁸ ho isa ho +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Litekanyetso tse ling li ka ba sieo. Mabaka a boikhethelo ho ctx (joaloka ctx.username) e kanna ea ba null. Kamehla hlahloba pele u sebelisa:
types.p11: Ho eketsa ? ka mor'a hore mofuta o tšoaee e le optional — boleng bo ka ba null. Ke kamoo liparamente tsa tšebetso le likarolo tsa state li hlalosang "sena se ka ba teng kapa se se ke sa ba teng":
types.p12: Haeba boleng bo ka 'na ba se ke ba lula bo le teng, e hlalose T? 'me kamehla u hlahlobe != null pele u e sebelisa. Ho kena sebakeng sa null ha ho senye bot — it returns null ka khutso.
types.p2: Nomoro ea 64-bit e nepahetseng habeli floating-point.
types.p3: 10 / 3 e nang le lintlha tse peli int e fana ka 3 (e fokotsoe). Sebelisa 10.0 / 3.0 bakeng sa liphetho tsa decimal.
types.p4: E na le litekanyetso tse peli hantle: true le false.
types.p5: Khoele ea mongolo oa Unicode. Likhoele ke litekanyetso tse ke keng tsa fetoha.
types.p6: Tatelano e laetsweng ya boleng, kaofela ke tsa mofuta o tshwanang T.
types.p7: Ho fihlella index ho tsoa ho sebaka (mohlala, nums[99] ha lenane le na le likarolo tse 5) returns null ho e-na le ho senya bot ea hau.
types.p8: Pokello ea lipara tsa bohlokoa tsa bohlokoa. Linotlolo li tlameha ho ba mofuta o le mong, boleng bo tlameha ho ba mofuta o le mong.
types.p9: Mofuta oa return oa mesebetsi e se nang return boleng. Ha se hangata u ngolang void ka ho hlaka — ke ea kamehla ha ho boletsoe mofuta oa return.

variables.p1: Lintho tse fapaneng li boloka boleng tseo u ka li sebelisang le ho li fetola lenaneong lohle la hau.
variables.p3: Moqapi o kenyelletsa mofuta ho tsoa ho boleng bo ka letsohong le letona. Ha ho mohla u hlokang ho ngola mofuta ka ho hlaka - empa u can.
variables.p4: Kenya : TypeName ka mor'a lebitso le feto-fetohang:
variables.p5: Litlhaloso ke tsa boikhethelo - li sebelise ha mofuta o sa totobala ho tsoa boleng, kapa ha o batla hore khoutu e be self-documenting.
variables.p6: Lintho tse feto-fetohang li ka fetoha ka ho sa feleng. Abela boleng bo bocha ka =:

variables.p8: Liphetoho li teng ka har'a boloko { } tseo li phatlalalitsoeng ho tsona. Ha li bonahale ka ntle ho boloko boo:
